The '''Adminidome''' was a location on [[Hologram Fun World]] where the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] central operations were located; from here workers could oversee and hold control over the worldwide amusement park's many facilities. It was a major [[City/Legends|city]] in its own right, due to its sheer size and the fact that it was the base of HFW operations.

{{Loc-stub}}
